permission.denied: Location permission denied. Unable to start tracking.
permission.deniedShort: Location permission denied. Please enable in settings.
permission.requiredMessage: This app requires location permission to track your position during your shift. Please enable it in settings.

errors.bufferAlmostFull: Location buffer almost full ({{threshold}}/{{max}}). Waiting for network connection.
errors.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Please enable in settings.
errors.positionUnavailable: GPS signal not available. Check if location services are enabled.
errors.timeout: GPS timeout. Make sure you are in an open area.
errors.unknown: Failed to get location. Please try again.
errors.gpsDisabled: GPS is not enabled. Please enable location services to continue.
errors.gpsDisabledMessage: This app requires GPS to track your location. Please enable GPS in your device settings.
errors.unavailableClockIn: Location not available yet. Wait for GPS to acquire location.

clockInOut.clockOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to end this shift?
